title: selaginella megalura
intro: Selaginella megalura, also known as the "Fern Ally" or "Spikemoss," is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella megalura include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Selaginella megalura include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
